mapper.select: SELECT rr.status, u.nick_name AS tenantName, rr.time, rr.tenant_time AS tenantTime, u.id_num AS idNum, u.email, u.phonenumber, u.address FROM room_record rr LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON rr.tenant_id = u.user_id AND u.del_flag = 0 WHERE rr.room_id = #{roomId} AND rr.del_flag = 0 ORDER BY rr.time DESC
